summary: Full end-to-end testing of the new Creator Portal + Admin Creatives review feature. 21/21 backend pytest cases pass; complete UI flow (register -> logout -> duplicate blocked -> login -> upload display (300x250) -> upload video (mp4) -> admin approve/reject/size-filter) works. No blocking issues found.

issues: 1x1 PNG test asset gets stretched to fill card giving a solid red block; not a bug — real images will render fine.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 4900 lines — should be split into routers (creator, admin, creatives, calls, leads, analytics) for maintainability.
GET /api/creatives/{id}/file accepts token via ?auth= query — token can end up in server access logs. Consider a short-lived signed URL or streaming behind cookie auth.

creator_upload_creative reads full file into memory (await file.read()) before uploading — fine for banners but a large video could OOM the pod. Consider streaming/chunked upload with a hard size limit (currently no size cap enforced).
No file-size limit / mime-sniffing on upload; extension check alone is trivially bypassed. Add MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES and validate magic bytes.
_verify_pw / _hash_pw used — good — but no rate limiting / lockout on /api/creator/login (brute-force surface).
Admin approve/reject uses require_editor (correct), list uses require_admin — mismatch is acceptable but worth documenting.
test_credentials: Admin owner: username blank, password LemonPros2026!. Test creator created dynamically during runs; existing creator1@test.com / creator123 also present.
seed_data_creation: Backend test creates TEST_ prefixed creator + 1 display + 1 video creative each run (not cleaned up). UI test creates ui_creator_<random>@test.com with 1 display + 1 video creative. Consider adding cleanup task if the creatives collection grows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_creator_portal.py is module-scoped: run whole file (not just TestAdminReview) so the creator fixture sets display_id/video_id before admin tests. All 21 pass in ~3.5s. UI testids used: creator-auth-tab-login/register, creator-name-input, creator-email-input, creator-password-input, creator-auth-submit, creator-upload-open, creator-upload-type-video/display, creator-upload-size, creator-size-{size}, creator-upload-title, creator-upload-notes, creator-upload-file-input, creator-upload-submit, creator-upload-card-{id}, creative-status-{pending|approved|rejected}, admin-tab-creatives, admin-creatives-tab-videos/display, admin-creative-approve-{id}, admin-creative-reject-{id}, admin-creatives-size-{size}. Note: the Logout button is a plain button with text 'Logout' (no dedicated testid) — used get_by_role.
